calendar.matters:
Respondents Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Venue; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion To Change Venue
Off Calendar Oct-28-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Stephen Rose, Esq. (415.332.6000; stephenkentrose@gmail.com) for Petitioner.
Emmanuelle Soichet, Esq. (415.510.4426; emmanuelle.soichet@doj.ca.gov) Deputy Attorney General for Respondents.

ARGUED The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENTS KIMBERLY JOHNSON and CALIFORNIA STATE DEPARTMENT OF SOCIAL SERVICES' Motion To Change Venue is GRANTED. Petitioner is responsible for any transfer fees.

[see word minutes for details.]

Order is signed.

Judge: Vedica Puri, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/VP)
